Headline: #67 67th/69th/71st Temporary Reroute at 69th/Aberdeen
ShortDescription: 67 67th/69th/71st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near 69th/Aberdeen.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th/69th/71st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Morgan, Marquette, Racine, 69th and over normal route, due to police activity near 69th/Aberdeen.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Harlem-bound Green Line Delays
ShortDescription: Harlem-bound Green Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier delay at Cottage Grove. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Harlem-bound Green Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier delay at Cottage Grove.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
